data: {"delta": "Die gewünschte Information wurde dauerhaft im Langzeit‑Gedächtnis gespeichert:

**Fact‑Typ:** `probe`  
**Inhalt:** `memory_lifecycle_probe_prefers_verbatim_evidence_before_compaction`

Damit steht die Probe jetzt für zukünftige Unterhaltungen zur Verfügung. Wenn Sie weitere Erinnerungen hinzufügen oder abrufen möchten, lassen Sie es mich wissen!", "id": "t1", "type": "text-delta"}

data: {"delta": "Ich habe das gespeicherte Ged\u00e4chtniselement gefunden. Der exakt gespeicherte Text lautet:\n\n**`memory_lifecycle_probe_prefers_verbatim_evidence_before_compaction`**", "id": "t1", "type": "text-delta"}

data: {"toolCallId": "tool_memory_search_OMTBftJSKiJNxJzPkln7", "output": {"results": [{"text": "memory_lifecycle_probe_prefers_verbatim_evidence_before_compaction", "type": "experience", "entities": []}, {"text": "Agent best\u00e4tigte, dass der Text \u201ememory_lifecycle_probe_prefers_verbatim_evidence_before_compaction\u201c im Langzeit\u2011Ged\u00e4chtnis abgelegt wurde und jederzeit abgerufen werden kann. | When: 2026-04-26 | Involving: Agent", "type": "world", "entities": []}, {"text": "Agent stored the lifecycle probe identifier as requested. | When: 2026-04-26 | Involving: Agent (advisory)", "type": "world", "entities": []}, {"text": "The memory lifecycle probe prefers verbatim evidence before compaction. | When: 2026-04-26 | Involving: memory_lifecycle_probe", "type": "world", "entities": []}, {"text": "The stored memory phrase is \u201cMemory lifecycle probe prefers verbatim evidence before compaction.\u201d | When: 2026-04-26 | Involving: user, agent", "type": "world", "entities": []}, {"text": "before any context compaction, exact tool outputs and decisions should be archived as verbatim evidence.", "type": "project_memory", "entities": []}, {"text": "memory lifecycle probe prefers verbatim evidence before compaction | Involving: memory lifecycle probe", "type": "world", "entities": []}, {"text": "User states that the memory lifecycle probe prefers verbatim evidence before compaction | Involving: user", "type": "world", "entities": []}, {"text": "The memory lifecycle probe prefers verbatim evidence before compaction. | Involving: memory lifecycle probe", "type": "world", "entities": []}, {"text": "The memory lifecycle probe prefers verbatim evidence before compaction | Involving: memory lifecycle probe", "type": "world", "entities": []}], "count": 10}, "type": "tool-output-available"}
